text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Together we'll run for our dream♪ 
We'll keep trying, and wring out all our strength♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was amazing! Both the race and the concert! My heart's still pounding!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know, I know! And the best part of all was…

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Teio! 
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Did you see Teio's final sprint? Her power is incredible! 
She's second to none!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen had perfect pacing! She stays calm and composed 
all the way to the finish line. No one else can compare!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Teio!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
—— Well, did you see the way Teio's cute ponytail 
flutters in the wind as she runs?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I was too busy staring at McQueen's 
beautiful locks gleaming in the sunlight!!

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text: Hehe, look at those girls playing together. How adorable.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahem. Anyway, let's just agree that they were both incredible…

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Yes! Both of them were really cool! 
How could they not be?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um… Aaand Tokai Teio makes her move! She puts on 
a burst of speed to chase down Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Is that an impression of the commentator?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep! It's a little off though, don't you think? 
Doesn't quite do Teio justice.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But we've only just joined the academy. There's so much 
to learn! I'm gonna become just like Teio and my dad!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Your father… Oh, of course — he's a kind man 
who everyone in town loves, isn't he?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks for saying that. Yeah, I really admire my dad. 
He always puts other people's happiness first!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wherever he goes, he's always surrounded by smiles. 
That's why I wanna do the same and make people smile 
with my running!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Just like Teio does too! I'm sure it'll make 
my mom happy as well!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Though my reason's not exactly super deep like yours, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you joined Tracen Academy to fulfill 
your family's wish, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hmm, not quite. My family's wish — for me to win G1 races — is actually my dream too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was born thanks to the hopes and dreams of many people… 
My mother, my father, and everyone connected to our business.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to meet their expectations and show everyone 
my own unique style of running… just like McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I see! Well, I know you'll be able to make your dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You too, Kita! You'll make everyone smile, I'm sure of it! 
That's one of your strengths, after all!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: …Hehe♪
(Ding-dong, bing-bong…)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that chime… Oh no! It's almost curfew!! 
We have to hurry back to the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No need to panic. I'll just call my driver… 
Oh, I don't have my cell phone.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Then let's take a taxi… Um, you don't happen 
to have my wallet, do you, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nope, and I don't have any money on me either! 
We'll just have to make a run for it!! C'mooon!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl's Journal
text_block_list.text: "I messed up again today. Why does this always happen to me? Sigh…"

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl's Journal
text_block_list.text: "But it's okay! I'll have another chance with my next race. I'll push myself harder and definitely win the next one!"
The next day…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Phew, we're finally done… This place is way too huge for just two people to clean.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ahaha… Well, it was the RA's decision, so what could we do?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Quite brazen of you to break dorm curfew so soon after 
entering the academy. As a tribute to your bravery, I'll reward 
you both with a week's worth of cleaning duty."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, is that your impression of her yesterday? 
You're really good at impersonations, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I was so bummed out that it stuck in my head. 
But whatever! Cleaning duty just feels like another 
part of school life!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Plus, you're here with me, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? What about it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anything's fun when you're with your best friend! 
I can't wait for us to go running together too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. I feel the same way. But ——
WAAAAAH!!
